title: Enphase Energy Q2 2020 Earnings Preview
text: Enphase Energy Q2 2020 earnings preview showed consensus EPS Estimate of $0.14 (-22.2% Y/Y) and consensus Revenue Estimate of $123.24M (-8.1% Y/Y). Over prior 2 years, ENPH beat EPS estimates 75% and beat revenue estimates 75% of time. Q2 2020 exhibited expected year-over-year declines though company had track record of beating estimates in prior periods.
